title: Device Home Screen - Battery Charging Icon
scenario: Verify battery charging icon behavior on Device Home Screen: bolt icon appears when charger connected, percentage value returns when disconnected
steps: Ensure a headset/earbuds is paired and connected to the device.
Observe the battery icon on the Device Home Screen.
Connect the device to a charger.
Observe the battery icon on the Device Home Screen.
Disconnect the device from the charger.
Observe the battery icon on the Device Home Screen.
expected: When the device is connected to a charger, the battery icon changes to show a bolt icon instead of the percentage value. When the charger is disconnected, the bolt icon disappears and the percentage value is displayed again.
